summary: Comprehensive testing of ROSHKA STUDIO website completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend testing achieved 91% success rate with all core features working correctly.

resolved_issues.issue: POST endpoint returned 200 instead of 201 status code
resolved_issues.resolution: Fixed by adding status_code=201 to endpoint decorator

minor_issues.issue: Mobile menu visibility timeout during automated testing
minor_issues.note: Menu button is present and clickable, may be CSS animation timing issue

passed_tests: Backend create inquiry endpoint (/api/inquiries) - full and minimal data
Backend email validation - properly rejects invalid emails
Homepage hero section loads with navigation
All navigation links work and scroll smoothly to sections
Services section displays all 5 service cards correctly
About section with statistics displays properly
Contact form with all required fields (name, email, service type, project description, budget, timeline)
Form submission integrates successfully with backend API
Email link (mailto:ogrisko54@gmail.com) is clickable and correct
Footer with GitHub and email links present and functional
Mobile hamburger menu button is present and clickable
